steps.title: Find g(x) by substituting x-1 into f
Find the x-intercepts
steps.content:
The x-intercepts occur where $g(x) = 0$:
$$(x+6)(x+3)(x+1) = 0$$
Each factor gives a solution:
  • $x + 6 = 0$ yields $x = -6$
  • $x + 3 = 0$ yields $x = -3$
  • $x + 1 = 0$ yields $x = -1$

steps.title: Sum the roots
steps.content:
$$a + b + c = (-6) + (-3) + (-1) = -10$$
The correct answer is B.
